benchmark_task: Classify high-trust startups (top 33%). Baselines: 5-fold CV on same features. Model: actual held-out AUC.
comparison_note: Baselines evaluated with 5-fold cross-validation on real records (is_real=True). IntelliStake AUC is from actual held-out test evaluation (time-based split, 5,881 real records, synthetic excluded). Higher is better.
academic_reference: Gornall & Strebulaev (2020) Journal of Financial Economics — VC valuation uncertainty benchmark
defense_statement: IntelliStake achieves AUC-ROC of 0.915 on a held-out real-startup test set, versus random forest 0.519 and logistic regression 0.506 (5-fold CV on same features). Lift of +39.6 percentage points demonstrates the stacked ensemble captures complex non-linear patterns that simpler methods cannot.
